name: vibe-guard
description: Community-driven Claude skill for detecting security backdoors, vulnerabilities, and malicious patterns in AI-generated (vibe-coded) code. Covers 12 threat categories including RCE, data exfiltration, supply chain attacks, credential exposure, and AI-specific risks. Features language-aware detection, dependency scanning, dual-format output, and optional auto-scan mode.

plugins.name: vibe-guard
plugins.description: AI-aware code security auditor that detects backdoors, vulnerabilities, and malicious patterns in AI-generated code. Covers 12 universal threat categories with language-specific references and dependency vulnerability advisories.
